name: API-first and feasibility-first integration
preconditions: A workflow proposes an external service or platform integration
recommended_action: Verify official API availability, required permissions, operational constraints, and a smallest reversible feasibility check before implementation.
prohibited_actions: Treating browser automation or an unofficial endpoint as the default integration path
Promising delivery before feasibility is established
success_metrics: Feasibility decision records API availability, permissions, cost, and fallback
Implementation begins only after the smallest reversible check passes
failure_signals: Integration depends on an undocumented endpoint
Required access is discovered only after implementation starts

name: Credential isolation
preconditions: A workflow requires credentials, tokens, cookies, or account sessions
recommended_action: Keep credentials outside source, generated artifacts, logs, and shared handoffs; expose only the minimum scoped secret at runtime.
prohibited_actions: Writing plaintext credentials to repository files
Copying secrets into result JSON or diagnostic logs
Sharing one broad credential across unrelated services
success_metrics: No plaintext secret appears in tracked or generated content
Each integration uses a minimum-scope credential boundary
failure_signals: A secret is recoverable from a repository or artifact
A credential grants unrelated permissions

name: Human approval gate
preconditions: An action publishes, spends money, changes external state, or creates material legal or reputational risk
recommended_action: Pause before the consequential action and require an identified human approver to review the evidence, scope, and rollback path.
prohibited_actions: Inferring approval from silence
Reusing approval for a materially changed scope
success_metrics: Approval identity, time, and approved scope are recorded
No gated action occurs before approval
failure_signals: External state changes without an approval record
Approval evidence does not match the executed scope

name: License gate
preconditions: A dependency, plugin, model, dataset, template, media asset, or third-party code will be adopted or redistributed
recommended_action: Verify license identity, permitted use, attribution, redistribution, and commercial-use conditions before adoption.
prohibited_actions: Assuming public availability means reusable
Shipping an asset with an unknown or incompatible license
success_metrics: License and required obligations are recorded before use
Distribution matches the verified license conditions
failure_signals: License cannot be identified
Required attribution or redistribution terms are unmet

name: Evidence and rights fail closed
preconditions: Content or a decision depends on factual evidence, ownership, consent, or usage rights
recommended_action: Block the unsupported claim or asset when evidence or rights cannot be verified, and surface the missing requirement explicitly.
prohibited_actions: Filling an evidence gap with an invented citation
Publishing while rights status is unknown
Silently downgrading a required gate to a warning
success_metrics: Every released claim and asset has traceable evidence or rights status
Missing evidence prevents release and produces a clear diagnostic
failure_signals: Released content contains an untraceable claim
An asset is used with unknown rights

name: One writer per file
preconditions: Multiple workers operate concurrently in one repository
recommended_action: Assign exactly one active writer to each file and reserve shared status documents and integration changes for the integration owner.
prohibited_actions: Assigning overlapping file ownership to parallel workers
Letting workers edit shared status documents without explicit ownership
success_metrics: Every work order names owned and prohibited files
Parallel handoffs merge without overlapping edits
failure_signals: Two workers modify the same file concurrently
A shared document contains conflicting updates

name: Domain lead release flow
preconditions: A change spans specialized domain logic, integration, QA, and release decisions
recommended_action: Have the domain lead validate domain contracts, then hand off to the integration owner for cross-lane review, QA evidence, documentation, and final release action.
prohibited_actions: Allowing a domain lane to self-release without integration review
Treating implementation completion as release readiness
success_metrics: Domain acceptance and integration acceptance are separately recorded
Release includes QA evidence and a clear rollback state
failure_signals: A change releases without domain-owner acceptance
Integration defects appear after an isolated lane passes

name: Skill scripts resources and examples structure
preconditions: A reusable skill needs executable helpers, reference material, or usage demonstrations
recommended_action: Keep deterministic automation in scripts, selectively loaded knowledge and templates in resources, and concise representative usage in examples.
prohibited_actions: Embedding large reference material directly in the main skill instruction
Duplicating deterministic helper logic as prose
success_metrics: Skill instructions route to the smallest relevant supporting file
Scripts and examples are independently understandable and reusable
failure_signals: The main instruction file grows with unrelated reference content
Users must reconstruct a helper that should be executable

name: Skill golden cases
preconditions: A skill has stable expected behavior that can be demonstrated and regression checked
recommended_action: Maintain representative golden inputs and expected outputs or acceptance properties, including critical failure and gate behavior.
prohibited_actions: Treating a prose description as sufficient regression coverage
Updating golden expectations only to make a broken result pass
success_metrics: Golden cases cover the primary success path and protected failure gates
Behavior changes produce an explicit golden-case review
failure_signals: A regression passes because no representative case exists
Expected output changes without rationale
Causal claim not verified — evidence is correlational only
Sample size n=11 across 11 accounts — not statistically robust
Mechanic may read as comment-farming and could violate platform manipulation/spam policies if used without disclosure
name: 댓글에 특정 키워드를 남기면 DM으로 자료를 보내주는 CTA가 있는 게시물은 댓글:좋아요 비율이 반복적으로 높게 나타난다
prohibited_actions: Treating this pattern as validated or proven — only benchmark_observed/hypothesis_only evidence classes are recognized for this import
Promoting this pattern to VERIFIED/PROMOTED without independent human review per knowledge/patterns/promotion_policy.md
Reproducing the original Instagram post images or full captions — only the source URL and the structural claim above may be referenced
Using this engagement mechanic as the default or primary recommended CTA in generated content
Presenting this comment-keyword/DM-funnel mechanic as a general best practice without disclosing manipulation and funnel risk
recommended_action: [ENGAGEMENT MECHANIC — reference only, do not default-recommend; evidence=benchmark_observed] 댓글에 특정 키워드를 남기면 DM으로 자료를 보내주는 CTA가 있는 게시물은 댓글:좋아요 비율이 반복적으로 높게 나타난다
success_metrics: 인과관계(CTA가 반응을 유발한다는 결론)는 별개의 미검증 주장이며 이 confidence는 '비율 패턴이 반복 관측되었다'는 사실에만 적용됨

failure_signals: Causal claim not verified — evidence is correlational only
Sample size n=3 across 3 accounts — not statistically robust
name: 지역/기관 공지형 카드뉴스는 텍스트 오버레이보다 실사진 비중이 높고 CTA가 거의 없다
prohibited_actions: Treating this pattern as validated or proven — only benchmark_observed/hypothesis_only evidence classes are recognized for this import
Promoting this pattern to VERIFIED/PROMOTED without independent human review per knowledge/patterns/promotion_policy.md
Reproducing the original Instagram post images or full captions — only the source URL and the structural claim above may be referenced
recommended_action: [REFERENCE PATTERN — evidence=benchmark_observed] 지역/기관 공지형 카드뉴스는 텍스트 오버레이보다 실사진 비중이 높고 CTA가 거의 없다
success_metrics: 이전 버전에서는 hypothesis_only로 표기되었으나 evidence_urls 3건(계정 3개, 분야 2개)으로 표준 기준(2건 이상)을 충족해 수정함

failure_signals: Causal claim not verified — evidence is correlational only
Sample size n=1 across 1 accounts — not statistically robust
name: 인용·반전형 헤드라인 + 인물 사진 표지는 탐색(Explore) 알고리즘 확산에 유리할 수 있다
prohibited_actions: Treating this pattern as validated or proven — only benchmark_observed/hypothesis_only evidence classes are recognized for this import
Promoting this pattern to VERIFIED/PROMOTED without independent human review per knowledge/patterns/promotion_policy.md
Reproducing the original Instagram post images or full captions — only the source URL and the structural claim above may be referenced
recommended_action: [REFERENCE PATTERN — evidence=hypothesis_only] 인용·반전형 헤드라인 + 인물 사진 표지는 탐색(Explore) 알고리즘 확산에 유리할 수 있다
success_metrics: n=1, 이전 단계(instagram_feed_discovery_v1)에서도 동일 계정 관찰이 있었으나 독립 표본 아님

failure_signals: Causal claim not verified — evidence is correlational only
Sample size n=3 across 3 accounts — not statistically robust
name: 번호형 큐레이션 리스트 구조(장소/계정/제품 N개 나열, 각 항목 동일 포맷 반복)는 여행·지역, 생활정보, 유머·이슈 분야에서 공통적으로 나타난다
prohibited_actions: Treating this pattern as validated or proven — only benchmark_observed/hypothesis_only evidence classes are recognized for this import
Promoting this pattern to VERIFIED/PROMOTED without independent human review per knowledge/patterns/promotion_policy.md
Reproducing the original Instagram post images or full captions — only the source URL and the structural claim above may be referenced
recommended_action: [REFERENCE PATTERN — evidence=benchmark_observed] 번호형 큐레이션 리스트 구조(장소/계정/제품 N개 나열, 각 항목 동일 포맷 반복)는 여행·지역, 생활정보, 유머·이슈 분야에서 공통적으로 나타난다
success_metrics: 구조 반복 자체는 확인됨. 고반응과의 인과성은 별개의 미검증 주장(hypothesis)이며 이 confidence에 포함되지 않음

failure_signals: Causal claim not verified — evidence is correlational only
Sample size n=2 across 2 accounts — not statistically robust
name: 병원/공공기관 계정은 캐릭터 의인화 일러스트 + 파스텔톤 배경을 반복 사용한다
prohibited_actions: Treating this pattern as validated or proven — only benchmark_observed/hypothesis_only evidence classes are recognized for this import
Promoting this pattern to VERIFIED/PROMOTED without independent human review per knowledge/patterns/promotion_policy.md
Reproducing the original Instagram post images or full captions — only the source URL and the structural claim above may be referenced
recommended_action: [REFERENCE PATTERN — evidence=benchmark_observed] 병원/공공기관 계정은 캐릭터 의인화 일러스트 + 파스텔톤 배경을 반복 사용한다
success_metrics: 시각 스타일 반복(n=2)만을 주장함. '이런 계정의 좋아요 반응이 낮은 편'이라는 비교 주장은 표본 2건으로는 근거가 약해 이 candidate에서 분리했으며, 별도로 확정 주장하지 않음(팔로워 미확인으로 반응 고저 자체도 절대값 기준일 뿐)

failure_signals: Causal claim not verified — evidence is correlational only
Sample size n=1 across 1 accounts — not statistically robust
name: 게시 직후(수 시간 내) 관찰 시 반응이 0인 것은 정상 범위이며 콘텐츠 품질과 무관할 수 있다
prohibited_actions: Treating this pattern as validated or proven — only benchmark_observed/hypothesis_only evidence classes are recognized for this import
Promoting this pattern to VERIFIED/PROMOTED without independent human review per knowledge/patterns/promotion_policy.md
Reproducing the original Instagram post images or full captions — only the source URL and the structural claim above may be referenced
recommended_action: [REFERENCE PATTERN — evidence=hypothesis_only] 게시 직후(수 시간 내) 관찰 시 반응이 0인 것은 정상 범위이며 콘텐츠 품질과 무관할 수 있다
success_metrics: 단일 사례, 시간 경과에 따른 재관찰 없음(세션 내 1회성 관찰)

name: Human-owner Instagram interest filter
preconditions: Selecting daily candidates for a CardNews account
recommended_action: Prioritize reality conflict, reversal, debate, lived impact, seasonality, and visuality; reject generic notices, corporate disclosures, personnel announcements, promotional MOU copy, and drama-plot summaries unless a stronger account-specific angle is evidenced.
prohibited_actions: Selecting a topic only because it is informational
Using numeric fields to elevate low-interest corporate disclosure
success_metrics: Owner review rejects fewer candidates for no Instagram interest point
failure_signals: Candidate has no immediate curiosity or account-specific visual angle

name: Human-owner real reference media first
preconditions: Content covers a real brand season, celebrity outfit, product, swatch, makeup result, or other specific real-world visual subject
recommended_action: Use official or rights-cleared real reference imagery as the informational core; use clearly labelled AI imagery only for auxiliary generic explanation or real-life styling reinterpretation.
prohibited_actions: Replacing a real collection with an invented AI outfit
Presenting generated media as brand-authored, product-true, celebrity-worn, source footage, or factual evidence
success_metrics: Every factual visual subject is shown with traceable rights-cleared real media
Every auxiliary generated image is labelled and non-deceptive
failure_signals: Viewer cannot see the actual collection or product being discussed
Generated imagery can be mistaken for the real subject

name: Human-owner fashion curator authority boundary
preconditions: A new fashion account covers a globally established luxury house
recommended_action: Curate actual looks and explain recurring silhouette, material, color, and house context; reserve comparative criticism for work backed by prior-season, house-code, creative-director, peer-collection, and industry-review evidence.
prohibited_actions: Asking whether a luxury house is simply good, bad, or polarizing from an unestablished account
Issuing success or failure judgments without longitudinal fashion evidence
success_metrics: Copy distinguishes curation and explanation from expert criticism
Critical claims cite longitudinal evidence
failure_signals: CTA or headline sounds like an unknown account is judging the house
No prior-season context supports the verdict

name: Human-owner direct low-friction CTA
preconditions: A CardNews carousel needs a comment CTA
recommended_action: Ask one colloquial, topic-specific question that a viewer can answer immediately with a short phrase, choice, or look number.
prohibited_actions: Generic AI-sounding requests for diverse opinions
Forcing controversy where account authority or evidence does not support it
success_metrics: CTA can be answered without rereading the post
CTA matches the account voice and topic authority
failure_signals: CTA sounds formal, generic, or machine-written
CTA asks viewers to judge beyond the account's earned authority

name: Human-owner choice-worthy review gate
preconditions: A creative output will be shown to the owner for selection
recommended_action: Show only outputs with real or production-quality assets, mobile readability, account-specific emotion, and visual rhythm; keep wireframes and blocked placeholders internal.
prohibited_actions: Presenting geometric placeholders or empty comment panels as creative choices
Using a prototype label to excuse visibly non-competitive output
success_metrics: Every shown option is genuinely selectable for further production
failure_signals: Owner must imagine the missing visual quality
Output is useful only for engineering validation
반복 슬라이드
감정 전개 단절
과도한 텍스트
name: 근거량에 따른 가변형 감정 서사
prohibited_actions: 네 장 또는 한 장으로 고정
근거가 부족한 장면 추가
recommended_action: 고정 장수 대신 사건 도입, 감정 상승, 맥락, 반전 또는 판단 요청에 필요한 장면만 사용한다.

failure_signals: 출처 성격 혼동
사실과 의견 혼합
무관 이미지
name: 원자료 형식 보존형 편집
prohibited_actions: 원자료와 무관한 인물 이미지 사용
주장을 확인 사실로 변경
recommended_action: 보도는 사실을 왜곡하지 않고, 짤·썰 계정은 허용된 의견과 캡처 표식을 분리해 원자료의 성격을 보존한다.

failure_signals: 감정 불일치
사실 오인
낡고 저품질인 시각물
name: 감정 맞춤형 짤·밈·반응 매체 보완
prohibited_actions: 무관한 유명인 사용
사실 장면처럼 제시
권리 상태 미기록
recommended_action: 감정과 서사 역할에 맞는 짤, 밈, 반응 이미지 또는 GIF를 보조 매체로 선택한다.

failure_signals: 제품 식별 불가
반복 각도
정보와 이미지 불일치
name: 패션·뷰티 아이템 가변 시각 소개
prohibited_actions: 고정 장수 강제
실제 제품과 다른 생성 이미지로 대체
상품 연결 강제
recommended_action: 제품 원형, 착장, 각도, 디테일, 스타일링, 핵심 정보를 가용 자료에 맞춰 가변 순서로 구성한다.

failure_signals: 계정 식별 불가
첫 화면과 본문 불일치
name: 계정 약속을 드러내는 첫 화면
prohibited_actions: 모든 계정에 같은 표지 문법 사용
무관한 유명인으로 훅 생성
recommended_action: 뉴스, 짤·썰, 패션·뷰티, 발견형 매거진의 독자 약속에 맞춰 첫 화면의 이미지·제목·정보 밀도를 다르게 선택한다.

failure_signals: 편집 기준 부재
계정 약속 불명확
표지 문법 불일치
name: 호기심 기반 발견형 매거진 큐레이션
preconditions: 새롭고 의외이며 설명 가치가 있는 소재
prohibited_actions: 잡다한 소재 단순 나열
발견 가치 없는 무작위 혼합
recommended_action: 분야가 넓어도 발견 가치, 시의성, 짧은 설명, 반복되는 표지 문법으로 매거진처럼 재편집한다.

failure_signals: 시리즈 간 중복
맥락 없는 확장
고정 편수 강제
name: 터진 주제의 맥락형 시리즈 확장
preconditions: 하나의 주제가 실제로 확장 가치가 있음
prohibited_actions: 항상 정해진 편수 생성
관련성 없는 상품 끼워 넣기
recommended_action: 한 주제가 터지면 동일 내용을 반복하지 말고 계절, 생활 문제, 카테고리, 아이템 관점으로 후속 편을 확장한다.

failure_signals: 질문과 답변 불일치
가짜 사회적 증거
name: 실제 질문 기반 교육 목차
preconditions: 실제 댓글 또는 사용자 질문이 존재
prohibited_actions: 댓글 조작
존재하지 않는 반응 생성
recommended_action: 반복되는 실제 질문을 사회적 증거와 설명 순서로 사용하고 답변을 가변 목차로 구성한다.

failure_signals: 기능 불일치
억지 연결
사용 경험 날조
name: 서사적 반전과 자연스러운 상품 연결
preconditions: 상품 기능과 장면·인물·계절의 실제 연결이 존재
prohibited_actions: 모든 주제에 상품 강제
실사용 후기 조작
무관 상품 연결
recommended_action: 표면적 키워드보다 장면의 반전, 기능, 생활 맥락을 찾아 자연스러운 상품 후보를 제안한다.

failure_signals: 얼굴·신체 불일치
계정 간 모델 혼용
생성 표시 누락
name: 계정별 AI 진행자 일관성 게이트
preconditions: 동일 얼굴·신체 유지 메커니즘의 현재 테스트 통과
prohibited_actions: 미검증 반복 생성으로 동일 인물이라 주장
실제 인물로 오인시키기
recommended_action: 검증된 동일 인물 메커니즘이 있을 때만 계정별 AI 진행자를 반복 사용하고 계정 자산으로 관리한다.
